ALCO_MEDICAID_EVER Alcohol Use Disorders - Medicare Only Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
 DRUG_COMBINED Drug Use Disorders - Combined Medicare Medicaid Claims 0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims met and FFS
 DRUG_MEDICARE Drug Use Disorders - Medicaid Only Claims 0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims met and FFS
 DRUG_MEDICAID Drug Use Disorders - Medicare Only Claims 0 -
